settings.aboutText: Established by Dr. Tapesh Sharma and Dr. Richa Sharma, Twacha Skin Clinic is a premier centre of excellence in dermatology and aesthetics. Nestled in the upscale suburb of Dwarka, New Delhi, our clinic spans 3000 sq. ft., offering specialized consultation chambers, a photography room for progress tracking, and a pharmacy for trusted skincare products designed to enhance your care experience.

doctors.name: Dr. Tapesh Sharma
doctors.title: Co-founder and Medical Director
doctors.summary: Dr. Tapesh Sharma is a dermatologist and aesthetic physician with extensive experience in skin, hair and aesthetic treatments. He founded Twacha in 2007 and is known for face aesthetics, anti-wrinkle treatment and dermal fillers.
highlights: MBBS from SNMC, Agra and postgraduate Dermatology specialization from LLRM, Meerut.
Specializes in skin, hair and aesthetic treatments.
Active member of IACD, IADVL, ACSI and CDSI.
Regularly conducts lectures and training for dermatologists.
Uses modern technology to improve patient care and clinic workflows.

doctors.name: Dr. Richa Sharma
doctors.title: Co-founder and Medical Director
doctors.summary: Dr. Richa Sharma, the co-founder and Medical Director of TWACHA Skin Clinics, is a distinguished dermatologist with an accomplished educational background, having completed her MBBS and MD in Dermatology at the prestigious Lady Hardinge Medical College, New Delhi. Before launching TWACHA in Delhi, she enriched her career as a lecturer in dermatology at SRMS Medical College and as a consultant dermatologist at a leading aesthetic clinic chain. Dr. Sharma is celebrated for her extensive hair disorders and aesthetic dermatology expertise, bringing a profound academic foundation to her patient care, which is marked by compassion and personalized attention.
highlights: She completed MBBS and MD Dermatology at Lady Hardinge Medical College, New Delhi.
A former lecturer at SRMS Medical College and consultant dermatologist.
Numerous publications and invited lectures at both national and international dermatology conferences.
Authored chapters on Anti-Wrinkle Treatment and Fillers in aesthetic dermatology books.
An office bearer of IWDA and PDS; AAD, IADVL, ACSI, and CDSI member.
Renowned across India, key opinion leader for multinational pharmaceutical companies.

doctors.name: Dr. Neha Gupta
doctors.title: Consultant Dermatologist
doctors.summary: Dr. Neha Gupta is a consultant dermatologist, aesthetic dermatologist and cosmetologist with experience in clinical dermatology, procedures, lasers and patient-centred skin care.
highlights: Holds MBBS, MD and DNB in Dermatology.
Experienced in patient consultations and dermatological procedures.
Skilled in skin surgeries, lasers, microneedling, PRP, chemical peels and radiofrequency surgery.
Active participant and presenter at dermatology conferences.
Known for a warm and patient-centred consultation style.

doctors.name: Dr. Prachi Gupta
doctors.title: Consultant Dermatologist
doctors.summary: Dr. Prachi Gupta is a consultant dermatologist, aesthetic physician and hair transplant surgeon with over 12 years of clinical experience. Her areas include anti-wrinkle treatment, skin boosters, lasers and aesthetic transformations.
highlights: M.B.B.S and D.D.V.L qualified in clinical and aesthetic dermatology.
Expertise in advanced skin and hair treatments.
Experienced hair transplant surgeon.
Regular attendee of dermatology workshops and aesthetic training programs.
Combines medical science with cosmetic precision.

sections.heading: What are Chemical Peels?
body: Chemical peels are non-invasive skin treatments that utilize a chemical solution to exfoliate the outer layer of the skin. This process reveals a smoother, more radiant complexion underneath. At TWACHA Skin Clinic, we offer a range of chemical peels tailored to target specific skin issues and types.

sections.heading: How Chemical Peels Work
body: Chemical peels work by exfoliating the damaged outer layer of skin, revealing the healthier skin beneath:
Superficial Peels: Treat minor skin imperfections such as fine lines, mild discoloration, and rough skin texture.
Medium Peels: Address moderate skin concerns like sun damage, acne scars, and uneven pigmentation.
Deep Peels: Ideal for severe skin issues like deep wrinkles, pronounced sun damage, and significant pigmentation irregularities.

body: Step-by-Step Process:

sections.heading: Initial Consultation
body: Comprehensive consultation with our dermatologists to assess your skin type and concerns.

sections.heading: Customised Peel Selection
body: Select the most suitable chemical peel (Salicylic Acid, Glycolic Acid, Yellow Peels,Phenol Peels, Mandelic Peels etc.) based on your specific needs.

sections.heading: Application
body: Administering the chemical peel in a controlled environment to ensure safety and effectiveness. Each session typically lasts 30-60 minutes.

sections.heading: Comfort and Aftercare
body: Ensuring minimal discomfort and providing detailed post-care instructions for maximum results.

sections.heading: Ideal Candidates for Chemical Peels
body: Those with Acne-Prone Skin: Effective in managing breakouts and reducing acne scars.
Individuals with Photodamage: Those looking to reverse the signs of sun damage.
Patients with Hyperpigmentation: Suitable for anyone wanting to even out their skin tone.
People with Aging Concerns: Great for clients seeking to reduce visible signs of aging.

sections.heading: Who Should Avoid Chemical Peels
body: Pregnant or Nursing Mothers: The safety of peels during pregnancy or lactation is not established.
People with Active Skin Infections: Conditions like herpes simplex need to be treated before undergoing a peel.
Individuals with Certain Skin Types: Those with very dark skin tones may be at risk of post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
body: What are Chemical Peels? Chemical peels use a chemical solution to exfoliate the outer layer of the skin, revealing a smoother and more radiant complexion.
How do Chemical Peels benefit the skin? They smooth out rough skin texture, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, unclog pores, treat acne, and reduce hyperpigmentation.
Are Chemical Peels safe? Yes, when administered by experienced dermatologists, chemical peels are safe. We follow strict medical protocols to ensure your safety and comfort.
How long does a Chemical Peel session take? A session typically lasts between 30 to 60 minutes, depending on the type of peel being administered.
How many sessions will I need? The number of sessions required varies based on individual skin concerns and goals. Our dermatologists will create a personalized treatment plan for you.
Are there any side effects? Side effects are rare but may include mild redness, swelling, or discomfort at the treatment site. These typically resolve within a few hours to a day.
When will I see the results? Results can vary, but many clients notice improvements in skin texture and clarity after the first session. Optimal results are usually seen with a series of treatments.

Can anyone undergo Chemical Peels? While most people can benefit from chemical peels, a consultation with our dermatologists is necessary to determine if this treatment is suitable for you based on your skin type and concerns.

services.detailHtml:
Chemical Peel Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Transform your complexion with expertly administered the best Chemical Peel treatment in Delhi at Twacha Skin Clinic. Our specialized treatments address a variety of skin concerns, unveiling revitalized skin and renewed confidence. Discover the difference with our personalized approach and advanced techniques.

What are Chemical Peels?

Chemical peels are non-invasive skin treatments that utilize a chemical solution to exfoliate the outer layer of the skin. This process reveals a smoother, more radiant complexion underneath. At TWACHA Skin Clinic, we offer a range of chemical peels tailored to target specific skin issues and types.

Chemical Peel Services at Twacha Skin Clinic

Superficial Peels
Ideal for mild skin concerns and first-time patients, these peels gently exfoliate the outermost layer of skin to enhance texture and tone with minimal downtime.
Medium Peels
These penetrate deeper layers of the skin to correct moderate imperfections like deeper wrinkles and acne scars.
Deep Peels
Offering dramatic results for severe skin issues, these peels reach the deepest layers of the skin to perform intensive rejuvenation.

Benefits of Chemical Peels for Skin Health

Smooth Skin Texture

Reduces rough skin texture and diminishes fine lines and wrinkles.

Enhances Radiance

Revitalises dull skin, revealing a brighter and more youthful complexion.

Treats Acne and Scars

Unclogs pores, reduces acne breakouts, and diminishes acne scars.

Reduces Hyperpigmentation

Minimises the appearance of dark spots, sun damage, and uneven skin tone.

How Chemical Peels Work

Chemical peels work by exfoliating the damaged outer layer of skin, revealing the healthier skin beneath:

  • Superficial Peels: Treat minor skin imperfections such as fine lines, mild discoloration, and rough skin texture.
  • Medium Peels: Address moderate skin concerns like sun damage, acne scars, and uneven pigmentation.
  • Deep Peels: Ideal for severe skin issues like deep wrinkles, pronounced sun damage, and significant pigmentation irregularities.

The Procedure at TWACHA Skin Clinic

Step-by-Step Process:

1.

Initial Consultation

Comprehensive consultation with our dermatologists to assess your skin type and concerns.

2.

Customised Peel Selection

Select the most suitable chemical peel (Salicylic Acid, Glycolic Acid, Yellow Peels,Phenol Peels, Mandelic Peels etc.) based on your specific needs.

3.

Application

Administering the chemical peel in a controlled environment to ensure safety and effectiveness. Each session typically lasts 30-60 minutes.

4.

Comfort and Aftercare

Ensuring minimal discomfort and providing detailed post-care instructions for maximum results.

Ideal Candidates for Chemical Peels

  • Those with Acne-Prone Skin: Effective in managing breakouts and reducing acne scars.
  • Individuals with Photodamage: Those looking to reverse the signs of sun damage.
  • Patients with Hyperpigmentation: Suitable for anyone wanting to even out their skin tone.
  • People with Aging Concerns: Great for clients seeking to reduce visible signs of aging.

Who Should Avoid Chemical Peels

  • Pregnant or Nursing Mothers: The safety of peels during pregnancy or lactation is not established.
  • People with Active Skin Infections: Conditions like herpes simplex need to be treated before undergoing a peel.
  • Individuals with Certain Skin Types: Those with very dark skin tones may be at risk of post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation.

Benefits of Chemical Peel Treatment in Delhi at Twacha Skin Clinic

Expert Dermatologist Supervision

Experienced dermatologists ensure top-quality chemical peel treatments.

Personalised Treatment Plans

Custom chemical peels tailored to individual skin concerns.

Advanced Facilities

State-of-the-art technology ensures a safe, comfortable treatment environment.

Comprehensive Consultations

Targeted peel recommendations based on detailed skin assessments.

Holistic Skin Care Approach

Targeted peel recommendations based on detailed skin assessments.

See Our Results

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Chemical peels use a chemical solution to exfoliate the outer layer of the skin, revealing a smoother and more radiant complexion.

They smooth out rough skin texture, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, unclog pores, treat acne, and reduce hyperpigmentation.

Yes, when administered by experienced dermatologists, chemical peels are safe. We follow strict medical protocols to ensure your safety and comfort.

A session typically lasts between 30 to 60 minutes, depending on the type of peel being administered.

The number of sessions required varies based on individual skin concerns and goals. Our dermatologists will create a personalized treatment plan for you.

Side effects are rare but may include mild redness, swelling, or discomfort at the treatment site. These typically resolve within a few hours to a day.

Results can vary, but many clients notice improvements in skin texture and clarity after the first session. Optimal results are usually seen with a series of treatments.

While most people can benefit from chemical peels, a consultation with our dermatologists is necessary to determine if this treatment is suitable for you based on your skin type and concerns.

Testimonials: Real Stories from Satisfied Patients

sections.heading: What is DermaClean?
body: DermaClean is a comprehensive facial treatment that targets clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads. The procedure involves a series of expertly performed steps to ensure your skin is thoroughly cleaned and revitalized.

sections.heading: Extraction
body: Our expert dermatologists perform meticulous extractions to safely remove clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads without causing damage to the skin.

sections.heading: Application of Mild and Soothing Peels
body: After the extraction process, a mild, soothing peel is applied. These peels contain antibacterial properties that help reduce infection and inflammation, leaving your skin feeling refreshed and revitalized.

sections.heading: How DermaClean Works
body: Opens Pores: The steaming step softens and opens pores, preparing the skin for effective extraction.
Removes Impurities: The extraction process safely eliminates blackheads, whiteheads, and other impurities.
Revitalises Skin: The application of soothing peels calms the skin and promotes healing, leaving it refreshed and rejuvenated.

sections.heading: Conditions Treated with DermaClean
body: Acne and Blemishes: Dermal Clean effectively unclogs pores and diminishes the appearance of acne, promoting a clearer and smoother complexion.
Dull Skin: This treatment revitalizes and brightens skin that appears tired and lackluster, restoring a vibrant, healthy glow.
Fine Lines: DermaClean smoothens out fine lines, helping to visibly reduce early signs of aging for a more youthful appearance.
Uneven Skin Tone: It corrects pigmentation issues and balances skin tone, ensuring a more even and uniform complexion.
Skin Texture Issues: The treatment refines and smooths the skin’s texture, enhancing its overall feel and appearance for a polished look.

sections.heading: Ideal Candidates for Derma Clean
body: Individuals with Oily Skin: Derma Clean effectively manages excess oil and prevents breakouts, ensuring a clearer and healthier complexion.
People with Dull Skin: This treatment revitalizes your skin, restoring a radiant and healthy glow that enhances your natural beauty
Aging Skin Concerns: Dermal Clean works to reduce visible signs of aging, rejuvenating your skin for a fresher, more youthful appearance.
Those with Uneven Skin Texture : By smoothing and evening out the skin surface, Dermal Clean helps achieve a more uniform and refined skin texture.

sections.heading: Who Should Avoid Derma Clean
body: Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women: It's essential for women who are pregnant or breastfeeding to consult with their healthcare provider before undergoing Dermal Clean treatments.
People with Severe Skin Conditions: Individuals suffering from severe skin conditions like eczema or psoriasis should avoid Dermal Clean treatments to prevent exacerbating their symptoms.

Individuals with Active Skin Infections: Those with active skin infections are advised to wait until their skin condition improves before seeking Dermal Clean treatments to ensure safety and effectiveness.

Derma Clean Specialist & Derma Clean Clinic in Delhi

Achieve clear, glowing skin with our DermaClean procedure at TWACHA Skin Clinic in Delhi. This specialized treatment is designed to unclog pores and promote a healthy complexion. Our team of expert dermatologists is dedicated to providing a gentle and effective cleanup process that is safe for individuals of all ages, including teenagers.

What is DermaClean?

DermaClean is a comprehensive facial treatment that targets clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads. The procedure involves a series of expertly performed steps to ensure your skin is thoroughly cleaned and revitalized.

DermaClean Services at Twacha Skin Clinic

Salicylic Acid Cleanses
Perfect for oily and acne-prone skin, these cleanses help to deeply purify pores and reduce acne breakouts.
Glycolic Acid Treatments
These treatments are great for exfoliating the surface of the skin and revealing a brighter and more even skin tone.
Lactic Acid Soft Treatments
Ideal for sensitive skin, these gentle peels hydrate and brighten the skin without irritating..
Mandelic Acid Treatments
Excellent for all skin types, these treatments target fine lines, wrinkles, and skin discoloration, enhancing overall skin texture.

Steps Involved in the DermaClean Procedure

1.

Steaming

A gentle steam is applied to the face to open up pores, making it easier to remove blackheads and whiteheads.

2.

Extraction

Our expert dermatologists perform meticulous extractions to safely remove clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads without causing damage to the skin.

3.

Application of Mild and Soothing Peels

After the extraction process, a mild, soothing peel is applied. These peels contain antibacterial properties that help reduce infection and inflammation, leaving your skin feeling refreshed and revitalized.

Benefits of DermaClean Treatment

Deep Cleansing

Effectively removes dirt, oil, and impurities from clogged pores, resulting in clearer and smoother skin.

Reduction of Blackheads and Whiteheads

Minimises the appearance of blackheads and whiteheads for a cleaner and more refined complexion.

Prevention of Skin Infections

The application of mild, soothing peels helps reduce the risk of skin infections and breakouts.

Safe for All Ages

DermaClean is gentle and suitable for teenagers and individuals with sensitive skin.

How DermaClean Works

  • Opens Pores: The steaming step softens and opens pores, preparing the skin for effective extraction.
  • Removes Impurities: The extraction process safely eliminates blackheads, whiteheads, and other impurities.
  • Revitalises Skin: The application of soothing peels calms the skin and promotes healing, leaving it refreshed and rejuvenated.

Conditions Treated with DermaClean

  • Acne and Blemishes: Dermal Clean effectively unclogs pores and diminishes the appearance of acne, promoting a clearer and smoother complexion.

  • Fine Lines: DermaClean smoothens out fine lines, helping to visibly reduce early signs of aging for a more youthful appearance.
  • Uneven Skin Tone: It corrects pigmentation issues and balances skin tone, ensuring a more even and uniform complexion.
  • Skin Texture Issues: The treatment refines and smooths the skin’s texture, enhancing its overall feel and appearance for a polished look.

Ideal Candidates for Derma Clean

  • Individuals with Oily Skin: Derma Clean effectively manages excess oil and prevents breakouts, ensuring a clearer and healthier complexion.
  • People with Dull Skin: This treatment revitalizes your skin, restoring a radiant and healthy glow that enhances your natural beauty
  • Aging Skin Concerns: Dermal Clean works to reduce visible signs of aging, rejuvenating your skin for a fresher, more youthful appearance.
  • Those with Uneven Skin Texture : By smoothing and evening out the skin surface, Dermal Clean helps achieve a more uniform and refined skin texture.

Who Should Avoid Derma Clean

  • Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women: It's essential for women who are pregnant or breastfeeding to consult with their healthcare provider before undergoing Dermal Clean treatments.
  • People with Severe Skin Conditions: Individuals suffering from severe skin conditions like eczema or psoriasis should avoid Dermal Clean treatments to prevent exacerbating their symptoms.
  • Individuals with Active Skin Infections: Those with active skin infections are advised to wait until their skin condition improves before seeking Dermal Clean treatments to ensure safety and effectiveness.

services.detailHtml:
Melasma Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Melasma is a common skin condition characterized by dark, irregular patches on the face, particularly on the cheeks, forehead, nose, and chin. Often triggered by sun exposure, hormonal changes, or genetics, melasma can affect anyone but is more common in women. While melasma is not harmful, its visible nature can lead to frustration or self-consciousness.
At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we offer a range of advanced and customized treatments to help reduce and manage melasma effectively, bringing back an even, radiant complexion.

What Causes Melasma?

Melasma develops when the skin produces excess melanin, leading to dark patches. Common triggers include:

  • Sun Exposure:UV rays stimulate melanin production, worsening melasma.
  • Hormonal Changes: Pregnancy, oral contraceptives, and hormone therapy can trigger melasma, often called the “mask of pregnancy.
  • Genetics: A family history of melasma increases the risk.
  • Skin Sensitivity: Some skincare products and treatments can irritate the skin and worsen pigmentation.

Melasma Treatments at Twacha

At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we offer personalized treatments designed to lighten and manage melasma. Our dermatologists will assess your skin type and melasma severity to create a tailored treatment plan.

Topical Treatments

Prescription-strength creams containing active ingredients can help lighten dark patches by inhibiting melanin production.

Chemical Peels

Chemical peels exfoliate the skin and promote the turnover of pigmented cells, improving the appearance of melasma over time.

Laser and Light Therapy

Laser treatments such as Q-Switched Nd and Fractional Lasers target pigmented areas without damaging the surrounding skin.

Microneedling with PRP

This procedure creates tiny injuries in the skin, stimulating collagen production and accelerating healing, resulting in a brighter, more uniform complexion.

Medifacials
  • Pure Glow Medifacial: Designed to combat dull and uneven skin tone, enhancing radiance and restoring a youthful glow.
  • Hollywood Medifacial: Targets hyperpigmentation and sun damage, effectively lightening dark spots and promoting an even complexion.
Skin Boosters

Skin boosters, typically containing hyaluronic acid, deeply hydrate and rejuvenate the skin while reducing pigmentation.

  • Enhanced Hydration: Improves overall skin health and resilience against melasma triggers.
  • Improved Skin Quality: Brightens and enhances the skin's texture.
  • Target Areas: Effective on the face, neck, décolletage, and hands.
SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) Therapy

SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT is derived from salmon DNA, effective for treating pigmentation disorders by repairing damaged skin cells.

  • Skin Healing and Regeneration: Accelerates healing of damaged skin and lightens melasma patches.
  • Anti-Inflammatory Benefits: Reduces inflammation and dark patches.
  • Collagen Stimulation: Improves skin texture, firmness, and tone.
Preventative Care and Maintenance for Melasma

Alongside in-clinic treatments, maintaining a skincare routine and lifestyle can help manage melasma. Our dermatologists recommend:

  • Daily Sunscreen Use: Wear a broad-spectrum SPF 50+ sunscreen to prevent aggravation of melasma.
  • Gentle Skincare Routine: Use gentle cleansers and antioxidants, avoiding harsh scrubs.
  • Lifestyle Adjustments: Reduce stress, maintain a balanced diet, and protect your skin from pollutants.

Why Choose Twacha for Melasma Treatment?

At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we provide individualized care for each melasma patient. Our advanced technology, combined with expert dermatological care, ensures that you receive the best possible treatment for your condition.

Experienced Dermatologists

Our team of specialists has extensive experience treating pigmentation issues like melasma.

Customized Treatments

We develop a personalized plan based on your skin type, the severity of melasma, and your treatment goals.

Comprehensive Solutions

Our clinic offers the latest in pigmentation treatment, from lasers to skincare and innovative treatments like Skin Boosters and SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT Therapy.

Book Your Appointment Today

If you’re ready to reduce the appearance of melasma and achieve an even, radiant complexion, schedule a consultation with us today at Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic. Let our experts guide you through the best treatment plan to manage your melasma effectively.

Book your consultation at Twacha Skin Clinic today! Call us at

+91-9350303663

sections.heading: About this treatment
body: Hyperpigmentation is a common skin concern that results in dark patches or spots on the skin. While typically harmless, it can affect your confidence and self-esteem. At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we specialize in diagnosing the underlying causes of hyperpigmentation and providing advanced, personalized treatments to help you achieve clear, even-toned skin. Whether you're dealing with sunspots, melasma, or post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, our expert dermatologists are here to guide you every step of the way.

sections.heading: What is Hyperpigmentation?
body: Hyperpigmentation occurs when an excess of melanin (the pigment that gives skin its color) is produced in certain areas of the skin, leading to darkened patches or spots. There are various forms of hyperpigmentation, each with its own causes:
Melasma: Often triggered by hormonal changes, melasma appears as larger brown or gray-brown patches, typically on the face.
Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH): This occurs after an injury to the skin, such as acne, eczema, or a burn, leaving dark spots in the affected area.
Sunspots (Solar Lentigines): These are caused by prolonged sun exposure and appear as small, dark spots on areas exposed to the sun, like the face, hands, and arms.

sections.heading: Causes of Hyperpigmentation
body: While hyperpigmentation can be triggered by various factors, some of the most common causes include:
Sun Exposure: UV rays from the sun can increase melanin production, leading to sunspots or dark patches.
Hormonal Changes: Conditions like pregnancy or taking birth control pills can trigger melasma.
Skin Injuries or Inflammation: Acne scars, cuts, burns, or conditions like psoriasis can result in PIH.
Genetics: A family history of pigmentation disorders can make you more prone to developing them.
Medications: Some medications, including chemotherapy drugs, can cause hyperpigmentation as a side effect.

sections.heading: Hyperpigmentation Treatments at Twacha
body: At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we offer advanced treatments specifically designed to address hyperpigmentation, helping you achieve a clearer and more even skin tone. Our hyperpigmentation treatments include:
Chemical peels remove damaged outer layers of skin, promoting new, evenly pigmented skin. We offer:
Mild to Deep Peels: From superficial to deeper peels for stubborn pigmentation.
Customized Treatments: Tailored to your skin type and pigmentation concern.
Laser therapy effectively treats hyperpigmentation by targeting excess melanin:
Q-Switched Laser: Treats melasma, sunspots, and PIH without damaging surrounding skin.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL): Stimulates collagen production and improves skin texture.
This treatment creates tiny punctures in the skin, enhancing the healing process:
Microneedling: Triggers natural healing and new skin cell production.
PRP Therapy: Uses your body’s growth factors for accelerated skin regeneration.
Our Medifacials combine infusion benefits with energy-based devices to remove excess pigment:
Pure Glow Medifacial: Rejuvenates the skin and enhances radiance.

services.detailHtml:
Hyperpigmentation Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Hyperpigmentation is a common skin concern that results in dark patches or spots on the skin. While typically harmless, it can affect your confidence and self-esteem. At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we specialize in diagnosing the underlying causes of hyperpigmentation and providing advanced, personalized treatments to help you achieve clear, even-toned skin. Whether you're dealing with sunspots, melasma, or post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, our expert dermatologists are here to guide you every step of the way.

What is Hyperpigmentation?

Hyperpigmentation occurs when an excess of melanin (the pigment that gives skin its color) is produced in certain areas of the skin, leading to darkened patches or spots. There are various forms of hyperpigmentation, each with its own causes:

  • Melasma: Often triggered by hormonal changes, melasma appears as larger brown or gray-brown patches, typically on the face.
  • Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH): This occurs after an injury to the skin, such as acne, eczema, or a burn, leaving dark spots in the affected area.
  • Sunspots (Solar Lentigines): These are caused by prolonged sun exposure and appear as small, dark spots on areas exposed to the sun, like the face, hands, and arms.

Causes of Hyperpigmentation

While hyperpigmentation can be triggered by various factors, some of the most common causes include:

  • Sun Exposure: UV rays from the sun can increase melanin production, leading to sunspots or dark patches.
  • Hormonal Changes: Conditions like pregnancy or taking birth control pills can trigger melasma.
  • Skin Injuries or Inflammation: Acne scars, cuts, burns, or conditions like psoriasis can result in PIH.
  • Genetics: A family history of pigmentation disorders can make you more prone to developing them.
  • Medications: Some medications, including chemotherapy drugs, can cause hyperpigmentation as a side effect.

Hyperpigmentation Treatments at Twacha

At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we offer advanced treatments specifically designed to address hyperpigmentation, helping you achieve a clearer and more even skin tone. Our hyperpigmentation treatments include:

Chemical Peels

Chemical peels remove damaged outer layers of skin, promoting new, evenly pigmented skin. We offer:

  • Mild to Deep Peels: From superficial to deeper peels for stubborn pigmentation.
  • Customized Treatments: Tailored to your skin type and pigmentation concern.
Laser Treatments

Laser therapy effectively treats hyperpigmentation by targeting excess melanin:

  • Q-Switched Laser: Treats melasma, sunspots, and PIH without damaging surrounding skin.
  • Intense Pulsed Light (IPL): Stimulates collagen production and improves skin texture.
Microneedling with PRP

This treatment creates tiny punctures in the skin, enhancing the healing process:

  • Microneedling: Triggers natural healing and new skin cell production.
  • PRP Therapy: Uses your body’s growth factors for accelerated skin regeneration.
Medifacials

Our Medifacials combine infusion benefits with energy-based devices to remove excess pigment:

  • Pure Glow Medifacial: Rejuvenates the skin and enhances radiance.
  • Hollywood Medifacial: Targets hyperpigmentation and promotes an even complexion.
  • HydraFacial Medifacial: Deeply hydrates and revitalizes dry skin.
Dermal Infusion Treatments

This treatment combines exfoliation, extraction, and infusion of brightening serums:

It removes dead skin cells while infusing brightening agents directly into the skin, leaving it radiant and even-toned.

IV Nutritional Drips

Enhance your skin from the inside out with our IV Nutritional Drips:

  • Glow Drip: Contains Glutathione and Vitamin C for detoxifying and enhancing skin luminosity.
Topical Treatments and Prescriptions

For mild to moderate hyperpigmentation, we offer:

  • Hydroquinone: Inhibits melanin production.
  • Retinoids: Promote skin cell turnover.
  • Vitamin C Serums: Brighten skin and protect from free radicals.
  • Glutathione Drip: Reduces pigmentation and boosts skin radiance.
  • Skin Brightening Drip: Combines glutathione, vitamin C, and antioxidants for an even complexion.

Why Choose Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic for Hyperpigmentation Treatment?

At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we take a holistic approach to treating hyperpigmentation, combining the latest dermatological advancements with personalized care:

Experienced Dermatologists

Our team has extensive experience in diagnosing and treating all types of pigmentation issues, ensuring you get the most effective and safe care.

Advanced Technology

We utilize cutting-edge lasers, chemical peels, and other technologies to treat hyperpigmentation with precision and minimal downtime.

Personalized Treatment Plans

Every patient’s skin is unique, which is why we create customized treatment plans based on your skin type, the severity of your hyperpigmentation, and your overall aesthetic goals.

Comprehensive Care

We provide both in-clinic treatments and at-home skincare recommendations to ensure long-lasting, effective results.

Characterized by pimples, blackheads, whiteheads, and even cysts, acne can impact both appearance and self-confidence. Whether you're dealing with occasional breakouts or chronic, severe acne, Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic offers a range of comprehensive, effective solutions to help you achieve clear, healthy skin.

sections.heading: About this treatment
body: Acne is one of the most common skin concerns affecting individuals of all ages. Characterized by pimples, blackheads, whiteheads, and even cysts, acne can impact both appearance and self-confidence. Whether you're dealing with occasional breakouts or chronic, severe acne, Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic offers a range of comprehensive, effective solutions to help you achieve clear, healthy skin.

sections.heading: What Causes Acne?
body: Acne occurs when hair follicles become clogged with oil and dead skin cells, leading to inflammation and the development of pimples and cysts. Several factors can contribute to acne, including:
Excess Oil (Sebum) Production: Overactive sebaceous glands lead to clogged pores.
Hormonal Changes: Fluctuations in hormones, especially during puberty, menstruation, or pregnancy, can trigger acne.
Bacteria: The bacterium Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes) contributes to inflammation and pus-filled pimples.
Genetics: A family history of acne can increase the likelihood of developing the condition.
Diet and Lifestyle: High-glycemic foods, stress, and environmental pollutants can worsen acne.

sections.heading: Types of Acne
body: Acne can manifest in various forms, each requiring different treatments:
Blackheads and Whiteheads: Clogged hair follicles that are either open (blackheads) or closed (whiteheads).
Papules and Pustules: Red, inflamed pimples that can be filled with pus.
Nodules and Cysts: Deep, painful lumps that can lead to scarring if untreated.

sections.heading: Acne Treatments at Twacha
body: At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we provide customized treatments that address the underlying causes of acne and prevent future breakouts. Our expert dermatologists create personalized plans depending on the severity and type of acne.
Retinoids: Promote cell turnover to prevent clogged pores.
Antibiotics: Reduce inflammation and bacterial growth.
Benzoyl Peroxide and Salicylic Acid: Help to kill acne-causing bacteria and exfoliate dead skin cells.
Oral Antibiotics: Reduce inflammation and bacteria in the skin.
Oral Contraceptives: Can help regulate hormones that cause acne in women.
Isotretinoin: A powerful treatment for severe, cystic acne, reducing oil production and preventing scarring.

sections.heading: Chemical Peels
body: Chemical peels help exfoliate the skin, remove dead skin cells, and reduce acne-causing bacteria. They also minimize the appearance of acne scars and improve skin texture over time. At Twacha, we offer a range of chemical peels tailored for acne-prone skin, including:
Salicylic Acid Peels: Help unclog pores and reduce inflammation.
Glycolic Acid Peels: Stimulate skin renewal while helping to fade post-acne marks.

sections.heading: DermaClean
body: DermaClean is a comprehensive facial treatment that targets clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads. The procedure involves a series of expertly performed steps to ensure your skin is thoroughly cleaned and revitalized.

sections.heading: Laser and Light Therapy
body: Laser and light-based treatments are highly effective for treating acne and preventing future breakouts. These therapies target the underlying causes of acne and help reduce inflammation, bacteria, and oil production.
Fractional Laser Resurfacing: Treats both active acne and acne scars by promoting collagen production and skin healing.
Blue Light Therapy: Targets acne-causing bacteria and reduces inflammation without damaging the surrounding skin.

sections.heading: Microneedling with PRP
body: Microneedling combined with Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) can improve acne scars by promoting skin regeneration and collagen production. This minimally invasive treatment reduces the appearance of acne scars, improving the skin's texture and tone.

sections.heading: Medifacials
body: Acne Erase Medifacial: Specifically formulated to target acne-prone skin, this Medifacial helps to control pimple breakouts, reduce inflammation, and promote clearer and healthier skin.

sections.heading: Acne Scarring Treatment
body: For patients struggling with post-acne scars, Twacha offers a variety of treatments to smooth and rejuvenate the skin:
MNRF : MNRF is a minimally invasive treatment that combines microneedling and radiofrequency (RF) energy to stimulate collagen production and promote skin renewal.

Microneedling : Tiny needles create controlled micro-injuries in the skin, triggering the body's natural healing response. This process encourages collagen and elastin production, which are essential for maintaining skin firmness and elasticity.
Radiofrequency Energy : Gentle RF energy delivered through the microneedles further stimulates collagen production and tightens underlying tissues, resulting in a lifted and rejuvenated appearance.
PRP : Stimulates collagen production to reduce the depth of scars.
Chemical Peels : Help fade pigmented acne scars and improve skin tone.
Subcision : This simple procedure works very well for ice pick scars. It has minimal downtime and gives a good lift to individual scars.

sections.heading: Advanced Acne Treatments at Twacha
body: In addition to standard therapies, Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic offers advanced treatments for acne and post-acne skin rejuvenation:

sections.heading: Skin Boosters
body: Skin Boosters are injectable treatments that hydrate the deeper layers of the skin, improving texture and appearance. Skin boosters are especially helpful for acne-prone skin by:
Restoring Hydration: Hydrated skin is more resilient, preventing clogged pores and breakouts.
Improving Skin Texture: Skin boosters smooth out rough, uneven skin caused by acne.

sections.heading: SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) Therapy
body: SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT Therapy stimulates skin repair and regeneration, making it ideal for treating acne and post-acne scars. Derived from salmon DNA, SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT enhances healing and collagen production, promoting clearer, healthier skin.
Repairing Damaged Skin: SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT speeds up the skin's healing process, reducing inflammation and acne scarring.
Anti-Inflammatory: It calms inflamed acne lesions and prevents further breakouts.

sections.heading: Threads
body: Mono Threads, which are smooth, straight threads, are used primarily for skin tightening and rejuvenation without a lifting effect. Multiple threads are inserted in a mesh-like pattern to stimulate collagen. This fresh collagen replaces the old, scar collagen and causes marked improvement in acne scars.

sections.heading: Scar Revision Surgery
body: Punch excision, punch grafting, and punch elevation are often used to treat ice pick, rolling, and boxcar types of scars.

sections.heading: Why Choose Twacha for Acne Treatment?
body: At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we take a comprehensive approach to acne treatment, targeting the root causes of acne while providing long-term skin care solutions.

services.detailHtml:
Pimple & Acne Scars Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Acne is one of the most common skin concerns affecting individuals of all ages. Characterized by pimples, blackheads, whiteheads, and even cysts, acne can impact both appearance and self-confidence. Whether you're dealing with occasional breakouts or chronic, severe acne, Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic offers a range of comprehensive, effective solutions to help you achieve clear, healthy skin.

What Causes Acne?

Acne occurs when hair follicles become clogged with oil and dead skin cells, leading to inflammation and the development of pimples and cysts. Several factors can contribute to acne, including:

  • Excess Oil (Sebum) Production: Overactive sebaceous glands lead to clogged pores.
  • Hormonal Changes: Fluctuations in hormones, especially during puberty, menstruation, or pregnancy, can trigger acne.
  • Bacteria: The bacterium Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes) contributes to inflammation and pus-filled pimples.
  • Genetics: A family history of acne can increase the likelihood of developing the condition.
  • Diet and Lifestyle: High-glycemic foods, stress, and environmental pollutants can worsen acne.

Types of Acne

Acne can manifest in various forms, each requiring different treatments:

  • Blackheads and Whiteheads: Clogged hair follicles that are either open (blackheads) or closed (whiteheads).
  • Papules and Pustules: Red, inflamed pimples that can be filled with pus.
  • Nodules and Cysts: Deep, painful lumps that can lead to scarring if untreated.

Acne Treatments at Twacha

At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we provide customized treatments that address the underlying causes of acne and prevent future breakouts. Our expert dermatologists create personalized plans depending on the severity and type of acne.

Topical Treatments
Prescription creams and gels containing retinoids, benzoyl peroxide, salicylic acid, or antibiotics can help control mild to moderate acne by unclogging pores, reducing bacteria, and preventing inflammation.
  • Retinoids: Promote cell turnover to prevent clogged pores.
  • Antibiotics: Reduce inflammation and bacterial growth.
  • Benzoyl Peroxide and Salicylic Acid: Help to kill acne-causing bacteria and exfoliate dead skin cells.
Oral Medications
For moderate to severe acne, oral medications may be prescribed to target internal causes of acne:
  • Oral Antibiotics: Reduce inflammation and bacteria in the skin.
  • Oral Contraceptives: Can help regulate hormones that cause acne in women.
  • Isotretinoin: A powerful treatment for severe, cystic acne, reducing oil production and preventing scarring.

Procedures of Acne

Chemical Peels

Chemical peels help exfoliate the skin, remove dead skin cells, and reduce acne-causing bacteria. They also minimize the appearance of acne scars and improve skin texture over time. At Twacha, we offer a range of chemical peels tailored for acne-prone skin, including:

  • Salicylic Acid Peels: Help unclog pores and reduce inflammation.
  • Glycolic Acid Peels: Stimulate skin renewal while helping to fade post-acne marks.

DermaClean

DermaClean is a comprehensive facial treatment that targets clogged pores, blackheads, and whiteheads. The procedure involves a series of expertly performed steps to ensure your skin is thoroughly cleaned and revitalized.

Laser and Light Therapy

Laser and light-based treatments are highly effective for treating acne and preventing future breakouts. These therapies target the underlying causes of acne and help reduce inflammation, bacteria, and oil production.

  • Fractional Laser Resurfacing: Treats both active acne and acne scars by promoting collagen production and skin healing.
  • Blue Light Therapy: Targets acne-causing bacteria and reduces inflammation without damaging the surrounding skin.

Microneedling with PRP

Microneedling combined with Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) can improve acne scars by promoting skin regeneration and collagen production. This minimally invasive treatment reduces the appearance of acne scars, improving the skin's texture and tone.

Medifacials

Acne Erase Medifacial: Specifically formulated to target acne-prone skin, this Medifacial helps to control pimple breakouts, reduce inflammation, and promote clearer and healthier skin.

Acne Scarring Treatment

For patients struggling with post-acne scars, Twacha offers a variety of treatments to smooth and rejuvenate the skin:

  • MNRF : MNRF is a minimally invasive treatment that combines microneedling and radiofrequency (RF) energy to stimulate collagen production and promote skin renewal.
  • Microneedling : Tiny needles create controlled micro-injuries in the skin, triggering the body's natural healing response. This process encourages collagen and elastin production, which are essential for maintaining skin firmness and elasticity.
  • Radiofrequency Energy : Gentle RF energy delivered through the microneedles further stimulates collagen production and tightens underlying tissues, resulting in a lifted and rejuvenated appearance.
  • PRP : Stimulates collagen production to reduce the depth of scars.
  • Chemical Peels : Help fade pigmented acne scars and improve skin tone.
  • Subcision : This simple procedure works very well for ice pick scars. It has minimal downtime and gives a good lift to individual scars.

Advanced Acne Treatments at Twacha

In addition to standard therapies, Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic offers advanced treatments for acne and post-acne skin rejuvenation:

Skin Boosters

Skin Boosters are injectable treatments that hydrate the deeper layers of the skin, improving texture and appearance. Skin boosters are especially helpful for acne-prone skin by:

  • Restoring Hydration: Hydrated skin is more resilient, preventing clogged pores and breakouts.
  • Improving Skin Texture: Skin boosters smooth out rough, uneven skin caused by acne.

SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) Therapy

SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT Therapy stimulates skin repair and regeneration, making it ideal for treating acne and post-acne scars. Derived from salmon DNA, SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT enhances healing and collagen production, promoting clearer, healthier skin.

  • Repairing Damaged Skin: SKIN REJUVENATION TREATMENT speeds up the skin's healing process, reducing inflammation and acne scarring.
  • Anti-Inflammatory: It calms inflamed acne lesions and prevents further breakouts.

Threads

Mono Threads, which are smooth, straight threads, are used primarily for skin tightening and rejuvenation without a lifting effect. Multiple threads are inserted in a mesh-like pattern to stimulate collagen. This fresh collagen replaces the old, scar collagen and causes marked improvement in acne scars.

Scar Revision Surgery

Punch excision, punch grafting, and punch elevation are often used to treat ice pick, rolling, and boxcar types of scars.

Why Choose Twacha for Acne Treatment?

At Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic, we take a comprehensive approach to acne treatment, targeting the root causes of acne while providing long-term skin care solutions.

Personalized Treatment Plans

Every patient’s skin is unique, and our dermatologists craft customized treatment plans for effective results.

Expert Care

Our team of experienced dermatologists is skilled in advanced acne treatments.

Holistic Approach

We don’t just treat the symptoms—we help you maintain clear, healthy skin with long-term strategies, including diet, skincare routines, and sun protection.

Book Your Appointment Today

Struggling with acne or acne scars? Don’t let acne affect your confidence any longer. Book a consultation at Twacha Skin, Hair and Laser Clinic and let our expert dermatologists help you achieve clear, radiant skin.

Book your consultation at Twacha Skin Clinic today! Call us at

+91-9350303663
contact@twachaclinic.com
Book an Appointment

sections.heading: What is a Medifacial?
body: A Medifacial, or medical facial, is a clinical treatment designed to address specific skin concerns through a tailored approach that combines the relaxation of a spa facial with medical-grade effectiveness.

Unlike traditional facials, Medifacials use pharmaceutical-grade ingredients and tools to provide deeper nourishment and more significant corrective action for issues such as aging, acne, sensitivity, and pigmentation.

sections.heading: Visible Improvements
body: Experience noticeable improvements in your skin's texture, tone, and overall health.

sections.heading: Conditions that require Medifacial treatment
body: Acne and Acne Scars : Medifacials reduce acne and scars through deep cleansing, exfoliation, and targeted serums or light therapy.
Aging Skin : Medifacials combat aging by using ingredients that stimulate collagen production, smooth fine lines, and enhance skin elasticity.
Hyperpigmentation and Uneven Skin Tone : Medifacials use brightening agents like vitamin C or hydroquinone to correct dark spots, melasma, and uneven skin tones.
Dry and Dehydrated Skin : Intensive hydration Medi facials restore moisture and plumpness to dry skin using hyaluronic acid and other moisturizing serums.
Sensitive and Rosacea-Prone Skin : Gentle Medi facials for sensitive skin soothe irritation, reduce redness, and strengthen the skin barrier without causing further irritation.
Oily and Congested Skin : Medifacials for oily skin include deep-pore cleansing, exfoliation, and salicylic acid to control sebum and prevent breakouts.
Dull Skin : Medifacials revive dull complexions by combining exfoliants and antioxidants to remove dead skin cells and restore a natural glow.

sections.heading: Ideal Candidates for Medifacial Treatments
body: Individuals with Specific Skin Concerns : Ideal for patients looking to address particular skin issues such as wrinkles, sun damage, acne scars, or uneven texture.
Those Seeking Preventative Care : Suitable for individuals who want to maintain healthy skin and prevent future skin problems.
Patients Requiring Non-Invasive Solutions : Perfect for those looking for effective skincare treatments without the need for surgical intervention.

sections.heading: Who Should Avoid Medifacial Treatments
body: Individuals with Active Skin Infections : Such as cold sores or warts, should wait until these conditions have resolved.
Patients with Severe Acne or Rosacea : Might experience aggravation from certain treatments and should consult with a dermatologist first.
Those with Allergic Reactions to Specific Ingredients : Should disclose their allergies to ensure that no allergenic substances are used during the facial.

services.detailHtml:
Medifacial Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Revitalize and rejuvenate your skin with our specialized Medifacials at TWACHA Skin Clinic. Our range of six distinct Medifacials is designed to address various skin concerns, including acne, dullness, pigmentation, fine lines, and face sagging. Each Medifacial is tailored to meet your specific skin needs, providing you with a customized and effective skincare solution for a radiant and healthier complexion.

What is a Medifacial?

A Medifacial, or medical facial, is a clinical treatment designed to address specific skin concerns through a tailored approach that combines the relaxation of a spa facial with medical-grade effectiveness.

Unlike traditional facials, Medifacials use pharmaceutical-grade ingredients and tools to provide deeper nourishment and more significant corrective action for issues such as aging, acne, sensitivity, and pigmentation.

Six Specialized Medifacials at TWACHA Skin Clinic

Acne Erase Medifacial
Specifically formulated to target acne-prone skin, this Medifacial helps to control pimple breakouts, reduce inflammation, and promote clearer and healthier skin.
Pure Glow Medifacial
Designed to combat dull and uneven skin tone, this Medifacial rejuvenates the skin, enhances radiance, and restores a youthful glow.
Hollywood Medifacial
This Medifacial targets hyperpigmentation and sun damage, effectively lightening dark spots, and promoting a more even and luminous complexion. It also smooths the skin and makes it more elastic and supple.
MesoGlow Medifacial
Formulated to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, this Medifacial stimulates collagen production, improves skin elasticity, and restores a youthful and plump appearance.
Radiant Lift Medifacial
This Medifacial is designed to lift and tighten sagging skin, improve facial contours, and provide a more youthful and revitalized appearance.
HydraFacial Medifacial
Ideal for dry skin, this Medifacial deeply hydrates, nourishes, and revitalizes the skin, restoring moisture balance and enhancing overall skin health.

Benefits of Medifacials at TWACHA Skin Clinic

Customized Approach

We tailor each Medifacial to your unique skin concerns and goals.

Medical-Grade Products

We utilize high-performance skincare products for optimal results.

Advanced Techniques

Our aestheticians are trained in advanced skincare techniques to deliver deeper results.

Relaxing Experience

Enjoy a pampering and rejuvenating experience while addressing your skin concerns.

Visible Improvements

Experience noticeable improvements in your skin's texture, tone, and overall health.

Conditions that require Medifacial treatment

  • Acne and Acne Scars : Medifacials reduce acne and scars through deep cleansing, exfoliation, and targeted serums or light therapy.
  • Aging Skin : Medifacials combat aging by using ingredients that stimulate collagen production, smooth fine lines, and enhance skin elasticity.
  • Hyperpigmentation and Uneven Skin Tone : Medifacials use brightening agents like vitamin C or hydroquinone to correct dark spots, melasma, and uneven skin tones.
  • Dry and Dehydrated Skin : Intensive hydration Medi facials restore moisture and plumpness to dry skin using hyaluronic acid and other moisturizing serums.
  • Sensitive and Rosacea-Prone Skin : Gentle Medi facials for sensitive skin soothe irritation, reduce redness, and strengthen the skin barrier without causing further irritation.
  • Oily and Congested Skin : Medifacials for oily skin include deep-pore cleansing, exfoliation, and salicylic acid to control sebum and prevent breakouts.
  • Dull Skin : Medifacials revive dull complexions by combining exfoliants and antioxidants to remove dead skin cells and restore a natural glow.

Ideal Candidates for Medifacial Treatments

  • Individuals with Specific Skin Concerns : Ideal for patients looking to address particular skin issues such as wrinkles, sun damage, acne scars, or uneven texture.
  • Those Seeking Preventative Care : Suitable for individuals who want to maintain healthy skin and prevent future skin problems.
  • Patients Requiring Non-Invasive Solutions : Perfect for those looking for effective skincare treatments without the need for surgical intervention.

Who Should Avoid Medifacial Treatments

  • Individuals with Active Skin Infections : Such as cold sores or warts, should wait until these conditions have resolved.
  • Patients with Severe Acne or Rosacea : Might experience aggravation from certain treatments and should consult with a dermatologist first.
  • Those with Allergic Reactions to Specific Ingredients : Should disclose their allergies to ensure that no allergenic substances are used during the facial.

Why Choose Twacha Skin Clinic for Medifacial Treatments

Experienced Skincare Professionals

Our team of dermatologists and aestheticians are trained in the latest skincare techniques.

Personalized Treatment Plans

We assess each patient's skin type and concerns to customize the treatment for optimal results.

Cutting-Edge Technology

Utilizing advanced equipment and high-quality ingredients to deliver the best possible outcomes.

Comfortable and Relaxing Environment

Patients enjoy a relaxing experience in a serene setting, designed to soothe as it enhances skin health.

See Our Results

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Depending on your skin condition and goals, treatments can be scheduled monthly or bimonthly.

There is no downtime required; patients can immediately resume their normal activities.

Medifacials are designed to be relaxing and pain-free, though some procedures might involve slight discomfort depending on the patient’s sensitivity.

Schedule Your Medifacial Treatment Today!

Transform your skin and achieve a revitalized and radiant complexion with our specialized Medifacial treatments at TWACHA Skin Clinic. Schedule your consultation with our expert dermatologists and discover the transformative benefits of our targeted skincare solutions.

Book your consultation at Twacha Skin Clinic today! Call us at

sections.heading: About this treatment
body: Tired of uneven skin tone, those pesky age spots, or the redness from acne? IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) treatment might be your skin's new best friend! At TWACHA Skin Clinic in Dwarka, we use IPL to give your skin a radiant glow.

sections.heading: What is IPL Treatment?
body: IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) Treatment is a non-invasive cosmetic procedure that uses broad-spectrum light to target skin concerns such as pigmentation, sun damage, acne, and unwanted hair. Imagine a burst of light energy gently targeting those skin imperfections. That's IPL! It's like a magic wand for your skin, tackling everything from sun damage to acne. By penetrating the skin's surface, IPL stimulates collagen production and breaks down dark spots, helping to achieve a clearer, smoother, and more even-toned complexion. It's a popular treatment for reducing the signs of ageing and improving overall skin texture without downtime.

sections.heading: Who Should Avoid IPL Treatments
body: Dark-Skinned or Tanned Individuals: IPL is less effective on darker skin tones and can cause pigmentation issues.

(IPL) Intense Pulsed Light Therapy in Delhi

Tired of uneven skin tone, those pesky age spots, or the redness from acne? IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) treatment might be your skin's new best friend! At TWACHA Skin Clinic in Dwarka, we use IPL to give your skin a radiant glow.

What is IPL Treatment?

IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) Treatment is a non-invasive cosmetic procedure that uses broad-spectrum light to target skin concerns such as pigmentation, sun damage, acne, and unwanted hair. Imagine a burst of light energy gently targeting those skin imperfections. That's IPL! It's like a magic wand for your skin, tackling everything from sun damage to acne. By penetrating the skin's surface, IPL stimulates collagen production and breaks down dark spots, helping to achieve a clearer, smoother, and more even-toned complexion. It's a popular treatment for reducing the signs of ageing and improving overall skin texture without downtime.

IPL Services at Twacha Skin Clinic

Photorejuvenation
Boosts collagen production, reduces wrinkles, and enhances overall skin texture.
Pigmentation Reduction
Effectively lightens and removes sun spots, age spots, and other types of hyperpigmentation.
Vascular Lesion Treatment
Minimizes the appearance of spider veins and vascular birthmarks.
Acne Management
Reduces inflammation and clears acne, preventing future breakouts.
Hair Removal
Offers a long-term solution for reducing unwanted hair across various body parts.

Benefits of IPL

Clearer Skin

Reduces acne breakouts and fades acne scars.

Even Skin Tone

Targets age spots, freckles, and uneven pigmentation for a brighter you.

Reduced Redness

Calms down redness from acne or rosacea.

Smoother Skin

Boosts collagen production for a firmer, more youthful look.

How Does IPL Work?

IPL sends out pulses of light that target specific problems in your skin without hurting the healthy tissue. It's like a gentle reset for your skin.

The TWACHA IPL Experience

Our skin experts will tailor your IPL treatment to your unique skin. We'll create a plan to help you achieve your skin goals.
Here's why you'll love TWACHA :

Comprehensive Dermatology Expertise

Trust in our team's deep knowledge of skin and IPL treatments.

Personalized Skin Solutions

Enjoy a tailored approach to achieve your desired skin transformation.

Innovative IPL Technology

Benefit from the latest advancements in IPL for exceptional results.

Serene Treatment Experience

Relax and rejuvenate in our tranquil and welcoming clinic.

Ideal Candidates for IPL Treatments

  • Individuals with Photo-damaged Skin: Those looking to mitigate the effects of prolonged sun exposure.
  • People with Uneven Skin Pigmentation: Suitable for treating dark spots and skin discoloration.
  • Patients with Visible Veins: Effective in reducing the appearance of small blood vessels on the face and legs.
  • Anyone Seeking Hair Removal: Provides a reduction in hair growth for all areas of the body.

Who Should Avoid IPL Treatments

  • Dark-Skinned or Tanned Individuals: IPL is less effective on darker skin tones and can cause pigmentation issues.
  • Pregnant Women: Typically advised to wait until after pregnancy to avoid any risks.
  • Patients Taking Photosensitizing Medications: Such as certain antibiotics and antidepressants that can increase sensitivity to light.

services.detailHtml:
HydraFacial Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Unveil a radiant, hydrated, and rejuvenated complexion with our advanced HydraFacial treatment in Delhi. This non-invasive, multi-step process cleanses, exfoliates, extracts, and hydrates your skin for a revitalized glow.

What is a HydraFacial?

HydraFacial is a revolutionary treatment that combines cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, and hydration in a single, luxurious experience. Using a patented device, the treatment gently resurfaces your skin while delivering vital nutrients and antioxidants.

Steps of Hydrafacial in Delhi at Twacha Skin Clinic

Deep Cleansing
Removes impurities and excess oil from the skin's surface and pores.
Exfoliation
Gently sloughs off dead skin cells to reveal fresher, brighter skin underneath.
Extraction
Utilizes vortex suction to clean out pores without the pain associated with manual extractions.
Hydration
Infuses the skin with intensive moisturizers and nourishing serums to boost hydration and elasticity.
Antioxidant Protection
Delivers antioxidant-rich serums to combat environmental damage and reduce signs of aging.

Condition That requires Hydrafacial treatment

  • Acne and Oily Skin : Hydrafacial in Delhi helps manage and reduce acne by deep cleaning pores and removing excess oil. Its gentle exfoliation and extraction processes clear up congested skin without irritating it.
  • Dry and Dehydrated Skin : The treatment’s hydration step infuses the skin with moisture-rich serums, making it ideal for those with dry skin. It enhances the skin's hydration and leaves it looking plump and nourished.
  • Aging and Wrinkles : HydraFacial includes ingredients like peptides and antioxidants that reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a more youthful complexion through collagen stimulation and skin tightening.
  • Hyperpigmentation and Uneven Skin Tone : The treatment can help lighten hyperpigmentation and sun spots, resulting in a more even skin tone. The gentle peel solutions used in HydraFacial can help brighten the skin without the harshness of traditional chemical peels.
  • Sensitive Skin : Because HydraFacial is a gentle procedure, it’s suitable for sensitive skin types. It doesn’t use harsh chemicals and can be customized with specific serums that soothe and reduce redness.
  • Dull Skin : Hydrafacial in Delhi boosts the skin's radiance through thorough cleansing and exfoliation, removing dead skin cells and revealing brighter, fresher skin underneath.
  • Enlarged Pores : The vacuum-like extraction process used in HydraFacial effectively removes debris from pores, which can help them appear smaller and improve skin texture.

How Does HydraFacial Work?

The HydraFacial process involves several steps:
1.

Cleansing and exfoliation

Removes dead skin cells and impurities to reveal a fresh canvas.

2.

Peel and extract

Gently extract impurities and unclog pores for a clearer complexion.

3.

Hydration and infusion

Delivers a customized serum to address specific skin concerns.

4.

Protection

Infuses antioxidants to shield your skin from environmental damage.

Benefits of HydraFacial

Deeply cleansed and refreshed skin

Removes impurities and unclogs pores.

Improved skin texture

Reduces the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and enlarged pores.

Hydrated and plump skin

Infuses your skin with essential moisture for a dewy glow.

Even skin tone

Minimises the appearance of dark spots and hyperpigmentation.

Suitable for all skin types

Customizable to address your unique skin concerns.

Ideal Candidates for Hydrafacial Treatments

  • Individuals Seeking Comprehensive Skincare:Ideal for those looking for an all-in-one skin maintenance treatment that provides cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, hydration, and antioxidant protection.
  • Patients with Specific Skin Concerns : Effective for people looking to reduce the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, brown spots, oily skin, and enlarged pores.
  • Anyone Looking for Fast Results : Suitable for individuals needing immediate improvement in skin appearance for events or regular maintenance.

Who Should Avoid Hydrafacial Treatments

  • Individuals with Active Rashes or Sunburns :Those with significant skin irritation or damaged skin should allow time for healing before undergoing treatment.
  • Patients with Severe Acne : While Hydrafacial can help with mild acne, those with severe cases might need specialized treatment beforehand.

Why is Twacha Clinic Ideal for Your HydraFacial treatment in Delhi?

Expert Skin Assessments

Our professionals tailor the treatment to your specific needs.

Luxurious Treatment Experience

Enjoy a relaxing and rejuvenating session.

Advanced Technology

Benefit from the latest HydraFacial equipment.

Visible Results

Experience immediate and long-lasting improvements in your skin.

See Our Results

The treatment is gentle and relaxing.

It's recommended every 4-6 weeks for optimal results.

Yes, HydraFacial can help clear congested pores and reduce acne breakouts.

Yes, HydraFacial is gentle and suitable for most skin types.

sections.heading: About this treatment
body: Discover the transformative benefits of our state-of-the-art MNRF (Microneedling Radiofrequency) treatment in Delhi, at TWACHA Skin Clinic, Dwarka. This innovative procedure combines the power of microneedling and radiofrequency technology to address a variety of skin concerns, promoting a smoother, firmer, and more youthful complexion.

sections.heading: What is MNRF (Microneedling Radiofrequency)?
body: MNRF is a minimally invasive treatment that combines microneedling and radiofrequency (RF) energy to stimulate collagen production and promote skin renewal. Here's how it works:

Microneedling: Tiny needles create controlled micro-injuries in the skin, triggering the body's natural healing response. This process encourages collagen and elastin production, which are essential for maintaining skin firmness and elasticity.
Radiofrequency Energy: Gentle RF energy delivered through the microneedles further stimulates collagen production and tightens underlying tissues, resulting in a lifted and rejuvenated appearance.

sections.heading: Benefits of MNRF Treatment
body: Reduces Wrinkles And Fine Lines

sections.heading: Reduces Wrinkles and Fine Lines

sections.heading: Reduces Signs of Aging
body: MNRF treatment combats various signs of ageing, like sagging skin, loss of elasticity, and uneven skin tone.

sections.heading: Improves Skin Texture and Tone
body: The treatment can improve skin texture by minimising the appearance of enlarged pores and acne scars. It also evens skin tone by addressing sun damage and hyperpigmentation.

sections.heading: Safe and Effective
body: MNRF is a safe and well-tolerated procedure suitable for most skin types.

sections.heading: How MNRF Treatment Works
body: MNRF treatment combines the micro-injuries from needling with the thermal energy from radiofrequency to:
Stimulate Collagen Production: Promotes the natural healing process, resulting in firmer, more youthful skin.
Tighten Skin: The thermal effect of RF energy contracts collagen fibres and stimulates their production, leading to tighter, rejuvenated skin.
Enhance Skin Texture and Tone: Targets scars, enlarged pores, and pigmentation issues to provide a smoother and more even complexion.

sections.heading: Who Should Avoid Microneedling Radiofrequency Treatment
body: Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women : It’s advised to delay microneedling radiofrequency treatments until after pregnancy or breastfeeding.
Individuals with Active Skin Infections : Those with skin infections, open wounds, or rashes should wait until their skin is healed before undergoing treatment.
Patients with Autoimmune Disorders : People with autoimmune conditions affecting the skin should consult with a doctor before undergoing this treatment.
Individuals Prone to Keloids : Those with a history of keloid scarring should avoid microneedling radiofrequency to prevent further skin issues.

services.detailHtml:
Microneedling (MNRF) Treatment Clinic in Delhi

Discover the transformative benefits of our state-of-the-art MNRF (Microneedling Radiofrequency) treatment in Delhi, at TWACHA Skin Clinic, Dwarka. This innovative procedure combines the power of microneedling and radiofrequency technology to address a variety of skin concerns, promoting a smoother, firmer, and more youthful complexion.

What is MNRF (Microneedling Radiofrequency)?

MNRF is a minimally invasive treatment that combines microneedling and radiofrequency (RF) energy to stimulate collagen production and promote skin renewal. Here's how it works:

  • Microneedling: Tiny needles create controlled micro-injuries in the skin, triggering the body's natural healing response. This process encourages collagen and elastin production, which are essential for maintaining skin firmness and elasticity.
  • Radiofrequency Energy: Gentle RF energy delivered through the microneedles further stimulates collagen production and tightens underlying tissues, resulting in a lifted and rejuvenated appearance.

Benefits of MNRF Treatment

Reduces Wrinkles and Fine Lines

MNRF effectively diminishes the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines by promoting collagen production and tightening the skin.

Reduces Signs of Aging

MNRF treatment combats various signs of ageing, like sagging skin, loss of elasticity, and uneven skin tone.

Improves Skin Texture and Tone

The treatment can improve skin texture by minimising the appearance of enlarged pores and acne scars. It also evens skin tone by addressing sun damage and hyperpigmentation.

Safe and Effective

MNRF is a safe and well-tolerated procedure suitable for most skin types.

How MNRF Treatment Works

MNRF treatment combines the micro-injuries from needling with the thermal energy from radiofrequency to:

  • Stimulate Collagen Production: Promotes the natural healing process, resulting in firmer, more youthful skin.
  • Tighten Skin: The thermal effect of RF energy contracts collagen fibres and stimulates their production, leading to tighter, rejuvenated skin.
  • Enhance Skin Texture and Tone: Targets scars, enlarged pores, and pigmentation issues to provide a smoother and more even complexion.

The Procedure at TWACHA Skin Clinic

Step-by-Step Process :

1.

Initial Consultation

Comprehensive consultation with our dermatologists to assess your skin concerns and suitability for MNRF treatment.

2.

Personalised Treatment Plan

Customising the MNRF treatment to address your specific skin needs.

3.

Treatment Session

The MNRF procedure is performed in a comfortable setting by our skilled dermatologists. Each session typically lasts 60-90 minutes.

4.

Post-Treatment Care

Detailed aftercare instructions to ensure optimal recovery and results.

Reasons to Choose MNRF Treatment at TWACHA Skin Clinic

Expert Dermatologist Supervision

Our chemical peel treatments are administered by experienced dermatologists specialising in skincare and dermatological treatments, ensuring the highest standards of care.

Personalized Approach

Custom MNRF treatment plans tailored to target your specific skin concerns and achieve the best possible outcomes.

State-of-the-Art Facilities

Our clinic is equipped with the latest technology and advanced techniques, ensuring the highest quality care in a comfortable, sterile environment.

Holistic Skin Rejuvenation

Beyond the treatment, we offer comprehensive guidance on skincare routines and maintenance for long-lasting results.

Proven Success

Join the many patients who have experienced significant improvements in skin texture, firmness, and overall radiance with our MNRF treatments.

Ideal Candidates for Microneedling Radiofrequency

Individuals with Fine Lines and Wrinkles
Perfect for those looking to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles for a smoother, more youthful complexion.
Patients Seeking Non-Surgical Skin Rejuvenation
Ideal for individuals who prefer a minimally invasive solution to rejuvenate their skin without surgery.
People with Acne Scars
Beneficial for those wanting to diminish the visibility of acne scars and improve skin texture.
Those with Skin Laxity
Ideal for individuals experiencing mild to moderate skin sagging, seeking firmer, tighter skin.

Who Should Avoid Microneedling Radiofrequency Treatment

  • Pregnant or Breastfeeding Women : It’s advised to delay microneedling radiofrequency treatments until after pregnancy or breastfeeding.
  • Individuals with Active Skin Infections : Those with skin infections, open wounds, or rashes should wait until their skin is healed before undergoing treatment.
  • Patients with Autoimmune Disorders : People with autoimmune conditions affecting the skin should consult with a doctor before undergoing this treatment.
  • Individuals Prone to Keloids : Those with a history of keloid scarring should avoid microneedling radiofrequency to prevent further skin issues.

Our Happy Clients

“The MNRF treatment at TWACHA has significantly improved my skin texture and reduced my fine lines. Highly recommended!”

Suman R

“My acne scars have faded, and my skin tone is much more even. The results are fantastic!”

Rohit P

“TWACHA's MNRF treatment has made my skin look younger and firmer. I'm thrilled with the outcome.”

Kavita J

“The professional care at TWACHA and the MNRF therapy have transformed my skin.”

Rajiv K

“After trying many treatments, MNRF at TWACHA has finally given me the smooth, glowing skin I've always wanted.”

Priya S

See Our Results

Frequently Asked Questions

MNRF combines microneedling and radiofrequency energy to stimulate collagen production and rejuvenate the skin.

The combination of micro-injuries and RF energy promotes collagen and elastin production, improving skin texture, tone, and firmness.

Yes, MNRF is a minimally invasive and well-tolerated procedure when performed by experienced dermatologists. We follow strict medical protocols to ensure your safety and comfort.

A typical MNRF session lasts about 60-90 minutes, depending on the treatment area.

The number of sessions required varies based on individual skin concerns and goals. Our dermatologists will create a personalised treatment plan during your consultation.

Side effects are rare but may include mild redness, swelling, or discomfort at the treatment site. These typically resolve within a few hours to a day.

Results can vary, but many clients begin to notice improvements in skin texture and firmness after a few sessions. Optimal results are usually seen after completing the recommended treatment plan.

While most people can benefit from MNRF, a consultation with our dermatologists is necessary to determine if this treatment is suitable for you based on your skin type and concerns.
